lyrics:
Wandering through the echoes of time
Chasing a spark in the howling wind
Shadows whisper secrets untold
A voice inside calls me again
Lost in the halls of reason and doubt
The flames still burn, they won't go out

Through the night, through the storm
Through the silence, dark and worn
I hear the call, I feel the light
The fire within begins to rise

Bobo's Lair, never fading, burning bright beyond the sky\
Through the ages, through the trials, I will rise and never die\
Feel the thunder, hear it calling, deep inside my soul ignites\
Bobo's Lair, endless longing, guiding me into the night\

Mountains crumble, rivers divide
Still I walk where the dream collides
No chains can bind, no fear remains
The spark is wild, unrestrained

Through the night, through the storm
Through the silence, dark and worn
I hear the call, I feel the light
The fire within begins to rise

Bobo's Lair, never fading, burning bright beyond the sky\
Through the ages, through the trials, I will rise and never die\
Feel the thunder, hear it calling, deep inside my soul ignites\
Bobo's Lair, endless longing, guiding me into the night\

The stars above are burning bright
Their embers fuel my endless fight
Through time and space, I hear the sound
The fire never lets me down\

Bobo's Lair, never fading, burning bright beyond the sky\
Through the ages, through the trials, I will rise and never die\
Feel the thunder, hear it calling, deep inside my soul ignites\
Bobo's Lair, endless longing, guiding me into the night\
persona:
## 4Castle

The Future of Rock, The Power of Harmony

**4Castle **is a genre-defying, five-piece supergroup under Maricopa Records, built on a foundation of powerful vocal harmonies, intricate musicianship, and fearless innovation. Rooted in rock, but unbound by limitations, their music fuses elements of progressive rock, funk, Latin rhythms, blues, and folk, delivering a sound that is both technically complex and emotionally resonant.

### **A Band Like No Other**

Each member of **4Castle **brings a distinct voice-both musically and vocally-to the mix:
🎸 **Raven Cortez**(Lead Guitar, Vocals) – A fiery virtuoso with Latin and blues influences, weaving face-melting solos into every performance.
🎸 **Skylar “Sky” Monroe**(Rhythm Guitar, Vocals) – The poetic soul of the band, crafting melodic foundations and lyrically rich storytelling.
🎹 **Jonah Vega**(Keyboards, Vocals) – The sonic architect, layering psychedelic synths, Hammond organ swells, and cinematic orchestrations.
🎸 **Malcolm “Mack” Bishop**(Bass, Vocals) – The groove master, blending funk, jazz, and progressive rock into fluid, deep-pocket basslines.
🥁 **Eli “Fox” Foster **(Drums, Vocals) – The wild heartbeat, pushing the band forward with thunderous fills, polyrhythmic grooves, and explosive energy.

### **What Defines 4Castle?**

- **Multi-Layered Vocal Harmonies**– All five members **sing**, creating **rich, choral-like textures**that elevate every song.

- **Complex Arrangements & Bold Songwriting**– Each track is an **immersive journey**, balancing **technical mastery with raw emotion**.

- **Rhythmic Power & Innovation**– From **tight funk grooves to shifting time signatures**, their music **moves you-literally and figuratively**.

- **Lyrically Challenging Yet Accessible**– Their songs explore **deep themes of life, change, and resilience**, wrapped in **memorable hooks and melodies**.

### **4Castle’s Sound**

Imagine putting Emerson, Lake & Palmer, Heart, Led Zeppelin, Sly Stone, and Carlos Santana in a blender. The result? **4Castle**. Their music pays homage to the greats while pushing rock’s boundaries into the future.

### **Join the Journey**

With Maricopa Records, **4Castle **is set to redefine what a modern rock band can be. Expect genre-bending albums, electrifying performances, and music that resonates across generations.

🚀 Follow **4Castle **as they build their legacy-one song, one harmony, and one unforgettable moment at a time.

[](https://open.spotify.com/artist/4Cmxf7xuTHzf7UahMK2xJh)[](https://music.apple.com/us/artist/4castle/1801052673)![](https://www.maricoparecords.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/5-rooks-in-a-dark-setting-1.png)
## Releases

impression.text: This track establishes a spacious and melancholic atmosphere with clean, delayed guitars and an ethereal female vocal, feeling introspective and emotionally charged from the start. The energy builds dramatically from the restrained verses into a massive, anthemic rock chorus, shifting the feel from contemplative to triumphant. The production is polished and modern, creating a wide stereo image that feels open in quiet sections and impressively dense, yet clear, during the loud, layered choruses. A defining quality is the powerful dynamic lift into the chorus at 0:57, where the built-up tension is released into a wall of sound that solidifies the track's powerful, epic character.

review.review_text: "Bobo's Lair" earns its title as an anthem by actually building like one: the verses sit in a slow, measured D# minor groove at 83 BPM, clean guitars ringing with space, before the chorus hits like a door blowing open and 'Feel the thunder, hear it calling, deep inside my soul ignites' lands with genuine weight. That dynamic lift around the one-minute mark is the kind of moment 4Castle does better than almost anyone in their lane, closer in spirit to early Heart or prime-era Whitesnake than anything on indie radio right now. The lyric occasionally leans on its archetypes a little hard, but the conviction in the performance makes the familiar imagery feel earned rather than borrowed. A highlight.
anchors_used: quoted lyric: 'Feel the thunder, hear it calling, deep inside my soul ignites'
